Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Aigis's characteristic is boosted according to the percentage of Personas registered in the Persona Compendium.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Characteristics are unique abilities that automatically activate during combat. More information can be found on the status screen.[n]{f 1 1}
